Incident Report: Network Intrusion Summary — Eastern Pearl Logistics Holdings Limited (the Company), incorporated in Hong Kong.
On 29 May 2026 at 02:40 HKT, SOC detected anomalous exfiltration attempts from the office LAN at Unit 2301, 23/F, Jade Tower, 88 Seabreeze Avenue, Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
Impacted repositories: \\fileserver\OPS-STAFF\, \\fileserver\HR-Onboarding\, \\fileserver\M&A-Archive (read-only).
HR-Onboarding contained scanned forms with fields [Name], [HKID], [Passport No.], [Tel], [Email]; M&A-Archive comprised only completed deal circulars and press announcements already on the Exchange website.
One identifiable document was accessed: Contractor (IT Support) identity page — HKSAR Passport No.: KZ1234567.
Other samples in the same folder were blank templates (e.g., HKID: A123456(9) [invalid checksum sample], Tel (public): 3700 0000, Email: staff.form@example).
Company identifiers present elsewhere include: CR No.: 2876543; BR No.: 12345678-000-12-3 (illustrative); vendor bank a/c (masked): 003-456-000123-9 in favour of Coral Tech Services Co.
No payroll bank accounts, no customer addresses, and no trading account numbers were accessed; IR56E files reviewed were placeholders.
The Company notified its Data Protection Officer in accordance with PDPO guidelines and filed an incident update to the Harbour Securities Commission and the Victoria Exchange’s Listing Division within 1 business day.
Having regard to inside information provisions under local securities law, the information involved is either non-identifying templates or previously announced corporate materials; no price-sensitive information likely to influence dealers.
For the avoidance of doubt, there is no impact to fund operations managed by Pearl Bay Capital SPC or to any ongoing employment consultations.
Immediate controls applied: VPN token reset, privileged account audit, and forced rotation of shared folder passwords; malware indicator signatures updated.
Staff are instructed to submit the “Personal Data Handling Form (PDHO-01)” via hr@eplhltd.example; public enquiries may call our Helpdesk at 3800 1212.
External forensics support has been engaged from Lotus Ridge Cyber Advisory Ltd.; no suspension of dealings is anticipated under VEX Listing Rule 13.10, but we will continue to liaise with HSC as needed.
